title: DBX Cinematic Modpack
description: DBX Cinematic Modpack – A complete toolkit for turning Minecraft into a movie studio. Includes Replay Mod, camera tools, FPS boosters, shaders, and building mods so you can record smooth, professional cinematics for YouTube or showcases.
body:
![creatorpack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b749bcdc765aed83cc587d7d7dd11e2f7fe83987.png)

# 🎬 DBX Cinematic Modpack

**⚡ Turn Minecraft into your movie studio.**

Welcome to **DBX (DeadbusterX) Cinematic Modpack** — the ultimate toolkit designed for creators who want to transform Minecraft into a smooth, cinematic, and visually stunning world. Whether you’re making YouTube videos, shorts, machinimas, or cinematic screenshots, DBX has everything you need in **one powerful package**.

---

## ✨ Features at a Glance

✔️ **Cinematic Tools** – Advanced camera controls, replay recording, and scene editing.
✔️ **Smooth Performance** – Optimized FPS boosters, stutter-free recording, and lag reduction.
✔️ **Stunning Visuals** – Shader and lighting support, customizable skies, and immersive textures.
✔️ **Creative Freedom** – Mods for building, world-editing, and showcasing your creations.
✔️ **Universal Pack** – Works across multiple Minecraft versions with consistent setup.

---

## 📦 Included Mods (Highlights)

* 🎥 **Replay Mod** – Record, edit, and replay your Minecraft sessions like a movie.
* 🎥 **Camera Utils** – Smooth cinematic camera paths.
* ⚡ **Sodium / Lithium** – Boost FPS and world performance.
* 🌍 **Iris Shaders** – Bring your world to life with breathtaking shaders.
* 📸 **Camera utils Utils** – Capture your builds in style.

*(Full mod list included in the pack for transparency.)*

---

## 🎯 Who is this for?

* **YouTubers & Streamers** who want professional-looking Minecraft content.
* **Machinima Creators** looking for camera control + smooth recording.
* **Builders & Artists** who want cinematic showcases of their worlds.
* **Storytellers** turning Minecraft into a film set.

---

## 🚀 Installation

1. Download the modpack from Modrinth.
2. Install with a supported loader (Fabric/Quilt).
3. Launch Minecraft, select DBX, and start creating.
4. (Optional) Add your favorite shaders to level up visuals.

---

## 📢 Notes & Usage

* **Free to use** for all creators.
* Please **credit DBX (DeadbusterX)** if you use the pack in your public content.
* Not for resale or repackaging.

---

## 🌐 Connect with Us

Join the DBX creative movement — **your Minecraft world deserves the cinematic spotlight.** 🎬✨
